title: TCS Nashik case: Sessions court reserves order in Nida Khan's anticipatory bail plea; verdict on May 2
description: A Nashik court on Monday reserved orders on the anticipatory bail plea filed by Nida Ejaz Khan, an absconding accused in the TCS Nashik BPO religious conversion and sexual harassment case.Additional Sessions Judge KG Joshi of the Nashik Road court heard the Special Investigation Team (SIT) and Khan’s counsel at length during in-camera proceedings. The order is likely to be pronounced on May 2. No interim protection from arrest has been granted to Khan.The case concerns allegations that several a
